title: NIKE 2010 WORLD CUP INVITATION
description: This is limited edition invitation of 150 pieces. It was designed internally while working for Nike Global Football, The invitation was sent to press, special guests, and select employees to attend the World Cup in South Africa. They are hand signed and numbered by Mark Parker.Creative Direction: Andy WalkerArt Direction / Graphic Design: Brian Schmitt, Gary Horton, Dona Abduf, Nedjelco-michel Karlovich Production: Oy

title: NIKE CHRISTMAS CAMPAIGN
description: A Nike Christmas campaign created while working in Brand Design EMEA. Four images were created in accordance with each category. The images were used globally.

title: NIKE TIEMPO 94
description: Since 1994, football has changed. The game is faster, with dynamic full-field play essential for every player on the pitch. With this in mind, and with the input of athletes such as Carlos Tevez, Gerard Pique, and Ronaldinho, Nike Football melds the legacy of Tiempo with the needs of the modern game to create the best leather football boot to-date.

title: NIKE WORLD CUP POSTERS
description: These posters were created in collaboration with Hort in Berlin and Nike Global Football in EMEA.

title: NSW / TECH PACK WIND RUNNER SU14
NIKE - D’ARBLAY STREET
description: D’Arblay Street represents the ultimate mix of Nike’s DNA and Englishness.

title: NIKE RUNNING / NTL
description: Refitted in 2008, Niketown London's Running Pavilion was also created while working at Nike sharing the same floor as the Bootroom. This was created internally at Nike EMEA Brand design for Running.

title: MLLER SKATEBOARDS
description: We create limited edition hand made skateboards. Each are made from rare and exotic materials from an old lumber yard with no name that is equally as weird as our mill. We pick out as much crazy wood as we strap to our bikes and ride back to the mill. Each deck is made uniquely based on however Simon is feeling that day, so each one is completely unique of course.

title: YAAYAS
description: This brand is inspired by a simple belief: A party for every body each day. YAAYAS is driven by a passion for art, fun and luxury combined with everyday cleansing and fragrance products. A global, beauty care brand for the luxury market.
